title: Error
networkCheckConnection: Please check your connection and try again.
networkCheckRetry: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.
pairingWrongCode: Incorrect pairing code. Please try again.
pairingWrongCodeWithAttempts: Incorrect pairing code. Please try again. {{remainingAttempts}}/{{maxAttempts}} attempts remaining.
pairingWrongCodeWithRemaining: Incorrect pairing code. You can try {{remainingAttempts}} more times.
pairingClientBlocked: This phone has been blocked by this computer. Unblock it on the computer, then try again.
pairingTokenInvalid: The connection has expired. Enter the computer pairing code again.
exportDiagnosticsUnavailable: This build does not support exporting the diagnostics bundle.
pairingVersionMismatchMessage: The app versions on your mobile device and computer are incompatible. Please update the desktop app to the latest version and try again.
pairingBlocked: Pairing blocked. Please click 'Unblock Device' in desktop settings, or generate a new connection code and try again.
